meta.source: DOE Philippines — Oil Industry Management Bureau (OIMB)
meta.description: Weekly NCR retail pump prices per liter (PHP). Brand prices derived from DOE common price + typical brand premium/discount.
notes: TRAIN law (RA 10963): excise taxes took effect Jan 1, 2018 (+₱2.65/L gasoline, +₱2.80/L diesel)
COVID-19: historic lows Apr-May 2020 (WTI briefly negative Apr 20, 2020)
2026 Hormuz crisis: Iran war started, strait closed Feb 28, 2026; diesel peaked ₱153.70 Apr 7-13; ₱20 rollback Apr 14; ₱24.94 rollback Apr 21 per President Marcos

weekly_snapshots.note: Rollback 2: RON91 -P3.41, Diesel -P24.94 effective Apr 21 (Marcos Apr 18 announcement)
